description: Use this API to tabulate the voltage setpoints and desired voltage bands of voltage-controlling equipment in the working case (activity CNTB). Optionally, new scheduled voltages may be specified. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, next, bus, ckt, v = cntb(sid, all, apiopt, status, v)
python_syntax: ierr, next, bus, ckt, v = cntb(sid, all, apiopt, status, v)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag (used only when apiopt is 2). (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: apiopt
parameters.description: Mode of operation in the api. (input).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying used to control reporting and processing options. (input).

parameters.name: v
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying Voltage values. (input).

return_values.name: next
return_values.description: Returned as the next apiopt value expected by the api. (output).

return_values.name: bus
return_values.description: An array of three elements specifying a returned three bus values. (output).

return_values.name: ckt
return_values.description: Returned as the circuit id of the transformer returned in bus(2) and bus(3) when next returned as 3. (output).

return_values.name: v
return_values.description: An array of two elements specifying Voltage values. (input).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

apiopt.description: specify voltage setpoint for controlled bus.
specify voltage band for load drop compensating transformer.

status.description: For APIOPT=1, list subsystem controlled buses with conflicts. For APIOPT=2 or 3, no change.
For APIOPT=1, list all subsystem controlled buses. For APIOPT=2, change voltage setpoints to new setpoint in V(1). For APIOPT=3, change voltage band to new voltage band in V(1) and V(2).
For APIOPT=1, report at OPENed output device. For APIOPT=2 or 3, not used.
For APIOPT=1, list in progress area and allow voltage schedule change. For APIOPT=2 or 3, not used.
For APIOPT=1, process all controlling elements and controlled buses. For APIOPT=2 or 3, not used.
For APIOPT=1, process active controlling elements and controlled buses. For APIOPT=2 or 3, not used.

v.description: New setpoint when APIOPT=2, new VMIN when APIOPT=3. Returned as present setpoint when NEXT=2, returned as present VMIN when NEXT=3.
New VMAX when APIOPT=3. Returned as present VMAX when NEXT=3.

next.description: done with this execution of CNTBNW.
change VMIN, VMAX of load drop compensating transformer.

bus.description: Returned as controlled bus for which voltage schedule may be changed when Next=2. Returned as controlled bus for which voltage schedule may be changed when Next=3.
Returned as the from bus of the transformer when Next=3.
Returned as the to bus of the transformer when Next=3.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
invalid new voltage setpoint value (V(1) <= 0.5 or V(1) >= 1.5).
VMIN is not less than VMAX.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
